rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff David Bryans Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Court Order To Return Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF DAVID BRYAN's Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Court Order To Return Undertaking Continued to July 15, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of its moving papers to department 501 no later than June 26, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICKEY Y WONG VS. DORIS WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion/ Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 2. PLAINTIFF MICKEY WONG's Motion For Leave To File Amended Complaint continued to June 26, 2015 on Court's own motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING, AN VS. JOHN YO WONG, DOING BUSINESS AS BANKER REALTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Intervene On Behalf Of Real Parties In Interest
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 3. INTERVENOR HOUSING EQUALITY LAW PROJECT and IRENE REYNOSO's Motion To Intervene On Behalf Of Real Parties In Interest Hearing Required to address: (1) feasibility and availability of intervention where default has been entered against the defendant; and (2) sufficiency of notice of the motion. Intervenor to produce a copy of the Proof of Service of the motion on Plaintiff and Defendant giving sufficient notice of May 26, 2015 hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK PARTNERS, LLC VS. 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Request For Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens Request For Attorney Fees And Costs GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $2,600. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICK PARTNERS, LLC VS. 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANTS 744 UNION INVESTORS, LLC and PHILLIPS DEVELOPMENTS, LLC's Motion For Sanctions Against Plaintiffs Counsel For Violation Of Ccp Sec 128.7 GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: ANA-MARIA GUERRERO VS. JAMES MCDERMOTT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANTS JAMES MCDERMOTT and NICHOLAS ANDRADE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges discovery of the facts giving rise to causes of 3 and 4 no earlier than June 2014. Arguments brought up for the first time in reply are not considered. Unauthorized sur-opposition and sur-reply are stricken. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANA-MARIA GUERRERO VS. JAMES MCDERMOTT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Third And Fourth Causes Of Action Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANTS JAMES MCDERMOTT and NICHOLAS ANDRADE's Motion To Strike Third And Fourth Causes Of Action Of Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint DENIED, 10 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges discovery of the facts giving rise to causes of 3 and 4 no earlier than June 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 270 TURK STREET LLC VS. JULIO COUOH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Consolidated Action - Plaintiffs Motion To (1) Compel Discovery Responses; And (2) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 7. PLAINTIFFS (CONSOLIDATED CASE) RAUL UCAN and RUSSEL MENA's Notice Of Consolidated Action - Plaintiffs Motion To (1) Compel Discovery Responses; And (2) For The Award Of Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED. Verified responses shall be provided by hand delivery no later than June 16, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,100. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD L LAZZARETTO AND CONNIE LAZZARETTO TRUSTEES VS. KATHY RENEE HIRZEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Strike Pltf'S General Objections
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 8. DEFENDANT KATHY HIRZEL's Motion To Strike Plaintiff's General Objections DENIED. Moving party failed to meet and confer. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1000. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FREDERICK STREET PROPERTY LLC VS. JANIS ERICSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 15, 2015 line 9. DEFENDANT JANIS ERICSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)
